character.definition: (non-classical 憂) palpitation or fluttering of the heart, to become interested in something (usually as a result of persuasion); to move the mind; to start thinking; agitated; nervous
(same as 黨) name of a place, party; gang; clique
(same as standard form 郚) name of a state in old times
sound of a cat; bite; laugh
plow side by side; team of two
a parapet on a city wall
a marsh, pool; high; the fifth month
(Cant.) to press down or push out with the foot
